title: BBS CML EDITION
description: A bbs mod version that improves or adds some basic features
body:
We would like to give special recognition to the developers who make the development of BBS CML Edition possible. Thanks to the effort, dedication, and talent of **elgatopro300, sebolla, imraphy, diobede, and mattux**, this project continues to grow and improve every day. Their work is key to making this edition a reality.
We also want to acknowledge those who contributed to the code: **Ramusalte, bay4lly, Redstoniano, "SIRSY P", and Afegor**. Their contributions are an important part of making this project a reality. 
**Thank you very much for your incredible contribution!**

## **What is BBS CML EDITION?**

**BBS CML Edition** is a modified version of the original **[BBS mod’s source code](https://github.com/mchorse/bbs-mod)**.
Its goal is to expand and enhance the animation tools while maintaining full compatibility with the original system, adding advanced features for creators, animators, and users who want a more complete and powerful workflow.

![miniature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0bffe1ce2dd979e95b99f237ad550cd7b75fa39_0.webp)

---

## 🔧 **Main improvements over the original BBS**

### 🧱 **Structure Models**

* Allows you to **animate entire structures** simply by saving them in-game.
* Structures can be viewed, organized, and used just like any other model.
* To use them, simply save it with a structure block, then go into the tree model and select it from the list.
  
Example: This is a miniature made with the structural models.
  
![an example of what the structural model could be used for](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/095268e8abd047da4716ce961313174978b2d87e_0.webp)

### 🎚️ **Advanced Gizmos**

* Visual tools for **moving, rotating, and scaling**, similar to professional animation software.
* Improves precision, speed, and comfort while animating inside the editor.
* alternates with the "U" key

Example: This is the gizmo for translating, and there are other variations (rotate, scale, and pivot).

![gizmo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a46d1ed107434fd7f6b59335db4bcf96ef571178_0.webp)

### 🖌️ **Per-bone Textures**

* Each bone in the model can have **its own texture** while keeping the original UV mapping.
* Ideal for complex models, advanced customization, or highly detailed designs.

### 🦴 **Bone Anchoring**

* Allows you to **anchor bones** to pose tracks for more controlled and flexible animation.
* This option is enabled in the mod settings

Here's an example of what the bone anchoring would look like (this is to animate each bone individually):

![bone anchorage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f30cd8a0f8e2980503c26713bfb4cc0c6e857d38.png)

### 🎯 **Editable Pivot**

* You can **change the pivot point of any model** directly inside the editor.
* No need for external software to adjust pivot positions.
* This is more useful if you work with obj models

### 🗂️ **Group System**

* Organize your replays into **categories**, improving order and workflow in complex animations.
* To create a group of replays, you must first select the models you want to group, then right-click and use the groups button.

an example of what the replays category would look like

![categories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ceca4505665c07bb43f52c1775c1d3af519d3402.png)
